title: odontites vulgaris subsp. rothmaleri
intro: Odontites vulgaris subsp. rothmaleri is a subspecies of plant in the family Orobanchaceae, commonly known as a broomrape or toothwort. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Odontites vulgaris subsp. rothmaleri include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions due to its versatile medicinal properties.
